case_title: MAURICIO ALFONSO CASTRO VS. JESUS A. KUBARA ESPINOZA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MAURICIO ALFONSO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MAURICIO ALFONSO CASTRO IS PRESENT AND IS ASSITED BY ANDREA POLLOCK, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISHINTERPERTER #301700. HUGO LEDZEMA, WITNESS TESTIFIES ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANTJESUS A. KUBARA ESPINOZA, DBA SFC AUTOSALES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-18-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MAURICIO ALFONSO CASTRO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. NON-COURT INTERPRETER HUGO LEDEZMA WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. DEFENDANT JESUS A. KUBARA ESPINOZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MAURICIO ALFONSO AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, JESUS A. KUBARA DBA SFC AUTOSALES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, MAURICIO ALFONSO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, JESUS A. KUBARA DBA SFC AUTOSALES $489.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $489.00, PLAINTIFF PURCHASED AN AUTOMOBILE FROM DEFENDANT FOR $1,250.00. THE PRICE OF THE AUTOMOBILE WAS TO INCLUDE THE COST OF OBTAINING REGISTRATION AND A LICENSE FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES AND ALSO TO INCLUDE COST OF A SMOG TEST. DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVIDE THESE ITEMS. COURT FINDS DEFENDANT LIABLE FOR $414.00 FOR LICENSE AND REGISTRATION AND $75.00 FOR SMOG CHECK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
